subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, raise thy hands in utmost humility and supplication to the sacred threshold of the All-Sufficing Lord, and say: O God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله دست عجز و نیاز باستان مقدس حضرت بی نیاز بلند نما و بگو ای خداوند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
